requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (GSO IEC/CISPR 14 series under KUCAS)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（KUCAS下的GSO IEC/CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（KUCAS下的GSO IEC/CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances imported into Kuwait are assessed for electromagnetic compatibility within the mandatory KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) run by the Public Authority for Industry (PAI). The applicable references are the GSO-adopted versions of the CISPR/IEC household-appliance EMC standards: GSO IEC CISPR 14-1 (emission — requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus) and GSO IEC CISPR 14-2 (immunity — product family standard). GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) adopts the IEC/CISPR text as Gulf standards, which PAI references in the KUCAS technical evaluation. Conformity is demonstrated by an accredited test report (ISO/IEC 17025) feeding the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report; the appliance must also be rated for the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz single-phase grid. A per-shipment Certificate of Conformity is issued before the goods clear at Shuwaikh or Shuaiba.
summary.zh: 进口到科威特的家用制冷器具，其电磁兼容性在由工业公共管理局（PAI）运行的强制性KUCAS（科威特符合性保证方案）框架内进行评估。适用依据为GSO采纳的CISPR/IEC家用器具电磁兼容标准：GSO IEC CISPR 14-1（发射——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求）和GSO IEC CISPR 14-2（抗扰度——产品族标准）。GSO（海湾标准化组织）将IEC/CISPR文本采纳为海湾标准，PAI在KUCAS技术评估中加以引用。符合性通过认可（ISO/IEC 17025）的检测报告予以证明，该报告纳入KUCAS技术评估报告；器具还须按科威特240 V、50 Hz单相电网标定额定值。货物在舒维赫或舒艾巴口岸清关前须取得逐批货物的符合性证书。
summary.zht: 進口到科威特的家用製冷器具，其電磁相容性在由工業公共管理局（PAI）運行的強制性KUCAS（科威特符合性保證方案）框架內進行評估。適用依據為GSO採納的CISPR/IEC家用器具電磁相容標準：GSO IEC CISPR 14-1（發射——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求）和GSO IEC CISPR 14-2（抗擾度——產品族標準）。GSO（海灣標準化組織）將IEC/CISPR文本採納為海灣標準，PAI在KUCAS技術評估中加以引用。符合性通過認可（ISO/IEC 17025）的檢測報告予以證明，該報告納入KUCAS技術評估報告；器具還須按科威特240 V、50 Hz單相電網標定額定值。貨物在舒維赫或舒艾巴口岸清關前須取得逐批貨物的符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) — Public Authority for Industry (PAI), Kuwait — mandatory conformity scheme for regulated products (EMC assessed within the technical evaluation)
GSO IEC CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-1)
GSO IEC CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-2)
Grid rating: 240 V, 50 Hz single phase (Kuwait — Ministry of Electricity and Water, MEW)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both the Chinese and GSO standards descend from the same CISPR 14 family, the technical content is closely aligned, but Chinese CCC test reports are not directly accepted by PAI for KUCAS — a report mapped to the GSO IEC CISPR 14 references and the Kuwait 240 V rating is required.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国标准与GSO标准同源于CISPR 14族，技术内容高度一致，但PAI在KUCAS下不直接接受中国CCC检测报告——须提供对应GSO IEC CISPR 14依据并按科威特240 V额定值出具的报告。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國標準與GSO標準同源於CISPR 14族，技術內容高度一致，但PAI在KUCAS下不直接接受中國CCC檢測報告——須提供對應GSO IEC CISPR 14依據並按科威特240 V額定值出具的報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The technical content gap is limited because GB 4343.1 and the GSO IEC CISPR 14 references share the CISPR 14 lineage. The real gaps are procedural and market-specific: (1) KUCAS routing — EMC results must be submitted to PAI inside the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report; a standalone Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy KUCAS, and a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity must be obtained before customs clearance. (2) Standard reference mapping — the test report must cite the GSO-adopted CISPR 14 versions, and a CNAS/CCC report may need re-issuance or annotation by a KUCAS-recognised conformity assessment body. (3) Voltage rating — the appliance and its EMC test configuration should reflect the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz supply rather than China's 220 V; the 50 Hz frequency is identical, but the nominal voltage differs and should be declared on the rating plate and in the test report.
gap.zh: 技术内容差距有限，因为GB 4343.1与GSO IEC CISPR 14依据同源于CISPR 14。真正的差距是程序性和市场专属的：（1）KUCAS流程——电磁兼容结果须纳入PAI的KUCAS技术评估报告提交；单独的中国CCC证书不满足KUCAS，且须在清关前取得逐批货物的符合性证书。（2）标准引用映射——检测报告须引用GSO采纳的CISPR 14版本，CNAS/CCC报告可能需要由KUCAS认可的合格评定机构重新签发或加注。（3）电压额定——器具及其电磁兼容测试配置应反映科威特240 V、50 Hz供电而非中国220 V；50 Hz频率相同，但标称电压不同，应在铭牌和检测报告中声明。
gap.zht: 技術內容差距有限，因為GB 4343.1與GSO IEC CISPR 14依據同源於CISPR 14。真正的差距是程序性和市場專屬的：（1）KUCAS流程——電磁相容結果須納入PAI的KUCAS技術評估報告提交；單獨的中國CCC證書不滿足KUCAS，且須在清關前取得逐批貨物的符合性證書。（2）標準引用映射——檢測報告須引用GSO採納的CISPR 14版本，CNAS/CCC報告可能需要由KUCAS認可的合格評定機構重新簽發或加注。（3）電壓額定——器具及其電磁相容測試配置應反映科威特240 V、50 Hz供電而非中國220 V；50 Hz頻率相同，但標稱電壓不同，應在銘牌和檢測報告中聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC is assessed within the KUCAS technical evaluation administered by PAI; a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity referencing GSO IEC CISPR 14-1/14-2 is required before customs clearance at Shuwaikh/Shuaiba
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — KUCAS, Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for household refrigerators entering Kuwait is evaluated inside the mandatory KUCAS scheme against GSO-adopted CISPR 14-1/14-2. Because GB 4343.1 shares the CISPR 14 lineage the technical gap is small, but Chinese CCC test data is not directly accepted: results must be routed through a KUCAS-recognised conformity assessment body, referenced to the GSO standards, rated for the 240 V / 50 Hz grid, and supported by a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入科威特的家用电冰箱，其电磁兼容性在强制性KUCAS方案内依据GSO采纳的CISPR 14-1/14-2进行评估。由于GB 4343.1同源于CISPR 14，技术差距较小，但中国CCC检测数据不被直接接受：结果须经KUCAS认可的合格评定机构处理、引用GSO标准、按240 V / 50 Hz电网标定，并辅以逐批货物的符合性证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入科威特的家用電冰箱，其電磁相容性在強制性KUCAS方案內依據GSO採納的CISPR 14-1/14-2進行評估。由於GB 4343.1同源於CISPR 14，技術差距較小，但中國CCC檢測數據不被直接接受：結果須經KUCAS認可的合格評定機構處理、引用GSO標準、按240 V / 50 Hz電網標定，並輔以逐批貨物的符合性證書。
